key_evidence: No new escalation events in May 26-27 window per scanner
Two consecutive cycles without new precipitating action — earliest arc-stabilization signal
Cumulative 1,879 detentions / 260 arrests carry-forward, no new actionable evidence
Floor-proximity discipline preserves room for genuine new triggers (lethal force, formal CHP closure, emergency declaration)

events.label: Post-apply monitoring — arc continuation without new precipitating event

methodology_note: Tier C documented hold. Second-event-at-floor convention (Ruling 3, May 24) requires categorically distinct new event; none observed. Cumulative statistics are accumulation, not new events.
